title: leucas masaiensis var. tricrenata
intro: Leucas masaiensis var. tricrenata, also known as Leucas tricrenata, is a plant species of the genus Leucas, which is a type of flowering plant native to Africa. The medicinal properties of Leucas tricrenata include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Leucas tricrenata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat wounds and infections. Leucas tricrenata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and roots are often used in traditional medicine.
